narrative:
Windham Ex Vill Sd (Portage) exempted village school district has 2,231 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.1 percentage points.
